{{Quote|Morteos was responsible for the death of Republic General Crix Masst on Sinded. Masst was killed by a bomb that was wired into his personal speeder's repulsorlift generator. Morteos was nearly shot down by Y-wing patrol vessels while trying to escape Sinded, but his modified freighter was quick enough to outpace the aging starfighters.|Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="WBC" />}}
'''Morteos''' was an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who killed the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Masst]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sinded]]. The assassination was carried out by way of Morteos wiring a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] into the [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generator of the general's personal [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]], so that it would detonate when the craft was engaged in flight.
